English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Robert J. Kane papers
Kane, Robert J., 1911-
Kane, Robert J., 1911- (Title of work: Good sports..)
40-1-2723
11 cubic feet. 11 cubic feet.
1980-1992. Correspondence, publications. Correspondence, notes, drafts, financial records. Collection material in English 2267867
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
1998
EAD encoding:
Evan Earle, January 2014
Date modified:
Ben Wrubel, October 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Cornell University.
Class of 1932; Director of Athletics.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, notes, drafts, financial records pertaining to the writing and publishing of GOOD SPORTS; also, correspondence concerning the United State Olympic Committee (1980-1987) and the 1980 Moscow Olympics. Includes John Marcham's memos and other material pertaining to organizing the book.
Also, subject, working, and reference files pertaining to Kane's Directorship of Athletics at Cornell.
Cite As:
Robert J. Kane Papers, #40-1-2723. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Athletics -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Olympics -- 1980. Marcham, John. United States. Olympic Committee Cornell University -- : Adminsitration. Cornell University -- : Athletics.
